<svg width="400" height="300" viewBox="0 0 400 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>

      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#1E3799;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#2B5876;stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="url(#gradient)" />
  <path d="M 200,40 L 270,140 L 200,200 L 130,140 L 200,40 Z" fill="white" />
  <path d="M 180,80 L 220,80 L 220,115 L 180,115 Z" fill="navy" transform="translate(10,10)" />
  <path d="M 190,95 L 210,95 L 210,105 L 190,105 Z" fill="white" transform="translate(10,10)" />
  <path d="M 150,100 L 165,75 L 180,100 L 195,75 L 210,100 Z" fill="navy" transform="translate(30,90)" />
  <text x="200" y="250" font-size="14" font-family="Arial" fill="white" text-anchor="middle">
    <tspan font-size="16" dy="-2">New York School</tspan>
    <tspan font-size="16" dy="14">of Medicine</tspan>

</svg>

<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="0 0 400 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <title>Bicycle</title>
  <desc>A simple vector illustration of a bicycle with a yellow seat on a black background</desc>
  <rect width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>
  <!-- Bike Frame -->
  <path d="M180 100 L220 100 L265 140 L240 180 L240 280 L220 320 L180 320 L160 280 L160 240 L140 200 L180 100" fill="#333" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Handlebar -->
  <path d="M180 100 C180 80 200 50 220 70" stroke="#666" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat -->
  <path d="M240 200 L260 200 L265 180 L260 160 L240 160 L235 180 L240 200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Wheel (Left) -->
  <path d="M100 260 C140 260 140 300 100 300 C60 300 60 260 100 260 Z" fill="#333"/>
  <!-- Pedal -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <circle cx="120" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <line x1="100" y1="260" x2="120" y2="260" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Chain -->
  <path d="M140 200 C160 220 160 260 180 280" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Chainring -->
  <path d="M180 250 C180 270 160 270 160 250 L160 250 L180 250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat Stay -->
  <path d="M240 180 L265 40" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Front Fork -->
  <path d="M220 70 L60 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4"/>
  <!-- Brake -->
  <path d="M60 140 L80 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="600" viewBox="0 0 400 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <g id="woman">
    <!-- Woman's head -->
    <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="30" fill="#FFCFCC" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Woman's body -->
    <rect x="180" y="230" width="40" height="120" fill="#FFCFCC" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Woman's legs -->
    <polyline points="190,230 190,350 220,350 220,230" fill="#FFCFCC"/>
    <!-- Woman's arms -->
    <line x1="200" y1="220" x2="170" y2="260" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="200" y1="220" x2="230" y2="260" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Table -->
  <rect x="160" y="350" width="80" height="40" fill="#8B4513" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="170" y="390" width="60" height="80" fill="#D2691E" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  
  <!-- Bowl of fruit -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="400" r="40" fill="#E6E6FA" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  
  <!-- Fruits -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="390" r="20" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="210" cy="385" r="15" fill="#FFA500" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M195 380 Q 205 380 210 385" fill="#00FF00"/>
</svg>
